analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell structure. All expected fields (name, level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present and formatted correctly.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear and mechanically precise. Components are specified.

mechanics.effect: Grants the target the ability to move on vertical surfaces and ceilings (upside down) and grants a climbing speed equal to walking speed. Requires concentration.

component_check.material_description: a drop of bitumen and a spider

mechanics.class_viability: Appropriate distribution for a utility/transmutation spell available to Sorcerer, Warlock, and Wizard.

llm_audit.notes: Mechanics are sound. The spell provides significant utility for exploration and tactical movement within its level slot.
